description_long: This is a small, modern cabin partially embedded into a grassy, rocky hillside. The structure features a prominent use of wood and stone, with a flat roof and large glass windows on the front facade. The front of the cabin is open and inviting, with a visible table and chairs inside, suggesting a cozy living space. The surrounding terrain is uneven, with green moss and grass covering much of the rocky surface. The cabin appears to be designed for integration with its natural environment, blending into the hillside. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a minimalist approach to ornamentation.
description: A modern, wood-and-stone cabin built into a grassy, rocky hillside, featuring a flat roof and large front windows.
description_view_0: The cabin is mostly obscured by the hillside, with only the roof and some rocks visible.
description_view_1: The side of the cabin is visible, showing the structure nestled into the hill and the sloped terrain.
description_view_2: The front of the cabin is fully visible, displaying large glass windows, a wooden facade, and interior furnishings.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the cabin is shown, with the roof and hillside dominating the view and the cabin partially hidden.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with slight overhang, constructed from wood and possibly metal trim
attribute_window_arrangement: One large, rectangular window dominates the front facade, providing a wide, unobstructed view; no other windows are visible on the sides or rear.
attribute_door_placement: A single door is centered on the front facade, integrated with the large window area.
